name: galdor-bun-workspace
description: galdor-bun — a Bun/TypeScript agent framework. Build, orchestrate and observe AI agents.

scripts.build: tsc -p packages/core/tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p packages/provider-anthropic/tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p packages/provider-openai/tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p packages/provider-google/tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p packages/provider-bedrock/tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p packages/mcp/tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p packages/a2a/tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p packages/dashboard/tsconfig.build.json
